title: Freeze T549 unconditional ownership boundary
description: Confirm that T549 owns only the empty-context soft-evidence application path, while T550 owns contextual slice mutation, T551 owns structure-preserving validation, T557 owns the unconditional min-asset gate, and T544/T1737 own the command/event envelopes.

title: Resolve unconditional base marginals through the inference seam
description: Use the exact-inference adapter to read the addressed market's current unconditional marginal slice and feed that slice into normalized ProbabilityEdit preview/application logic.

title: Apply deterministic soft-evidence rescaling
description: Implement the unconditional ProbabilityEdit math by rescaling the targeted outcome to the requested probability and renormalizing the remaining outcomes deterministically, then compute the resulting impact score.

title: Persist accepted unconditional edit state
description: Materialize the accepted ProbabilityEdit order with previous/new marginals and impactScore, and mutate MARKETS[marketId]["marginals"] only for the empty-context acceptance path.

title: Thread unconditional edit results into audit and read models
description: Publish the accepted unconditional edit through the existing terminal event, pricing payload, replay-state hash, account-risk read model, and LMSR ledger slice integrations.

title: Lock the unconditional path with regression and invariant coverage
description: Cover empty-context success, idempotent replay, market mutation, and brute-force/invariant agreement so the unconditional soft-evidence path remains deterministic under refactors.
